titleStmt.title: SII 33.88: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 88. (A.R. No. 10 of 1948.) Jūṭūru, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Pillar set up in the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1444, Chitrabhānu, Bhādrapada śu. 15, Friday, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1522 A.D. September 5, Friday, lunar eclipse, °94.

Records the gift of certain taxes by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, svamidroharagaṇḍa Pedda Timmarāju, son of Varadayyadeva and Pāpasānamma. It also records the installation of the Utsava images. The gift for the conduct of the festivals, offerings and perpetual lamp for the merit of his parents on the occasion of lunar eclipse to the god Kēśava at Jūṭūru, situated in Pennabaḍi which was the nāyaṅkara assigned to him by Mahāpradhāna Sāḷuva Timmarasayya administering Gutti-sīma. Further, it states that the donor constructed the maṇḍapa in front of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1444 Agunēṭi citrabhānu saṁvatsara
bhādrapada śuddha 15 śu . śrīman mahārā
jādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī kriṣṇadēvarāyamahārāyalu pṛthivi
rājyamu śēyucuṁnu śrīmaṁn mahāpradhānu
ṁḍaina sāḷuva tiṁmarusayyaṁgārikini pāliṁci
na gutti sīmalōnu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
svāmidroharagaṁḍa varadayyadēvamahārājula kumā
ruṁḍu pedatiṁmarājugāru tamaku Ā tiṁmarusa
yya nāyaṁkarānaku yiccina peṁnabaḍilōni jū
ṭūri kēśavanāthaniki vutsava vigrahālagonitecci
pratiṣṭha śēyiṁci dēvuni muṁdari cāvaḍi māni maṁḍapa
muṁnu kaṭṭiṁci daśamī mahōtsavālaku ye 1 kirmā
ṁvaga 1 lekhanicci naivēdyanaku naṁdādīpānakuṁ gānu
yī dēvuniki cellē cēnumaḍi tōṁṭa māmiḍivrikṣā
lu mukhyamaina Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyamuluṁnu
kritamu Acce śrōtriya rokhālu māni sa¨rvamānyaṁ
sēsi tamatalli pāpasānaṁmakuṁnu tama taṁḍri varada
rājayyakun puṁṇyamugānu sōmagrahaṇa puṁṇya
kālamaṁdu Āceṁdrā¨rkastāyigānu dhāra
vōsi yistimi Ani yiccina dha¨rmaśāsanamū .
yiṁdkutappi yīdēvunisvāsthyālaku yavvaṁḍu
Āśapaḍinavāṁḍuṁnu svayaṁ mātṛgamanaṁsēsi
na vāṁḍu gōhatya braṁhmatyasēsinavāṁḍu tana
mānamu ceṁḍālunaku yiccina vāṁḍu
Aḍuga kōyiḍi yerigi dha¨rmamu
naḍapeḍi maṁgaḷamā
hā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
